description: A spec-conformant receipt that passes Python validate_receipt() but is rejected by the TypeScript verifier because TS checks for 'type' and 'timestamp' instead of the canonical spec fields 'ts', 'trace_id', 'mcp', etc.

expected_typescript.reason: TS requires 'type' and 'timestamp' fields (verify-core.ts:325) which are absent from the canonical spec. This receipt is schema-valid but TS rejects it.

conformance_requirement: A conforming verifier pair MUST agree on this receipt. Either both pass or both fail. Divergent outcomes prove verifier parity invariant is violated.
